==== arrayObj.pop ====
Removes the last element from an array and returns it.

  arrayObj.pop()

**Remarks**

The **[[wiki:NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.JScript.Array.push|push]]** and **pop** methods enable you to simulate a **stack**, which uses the principle of last in, first out (**LIFO**) to store data.

The required **arrayObj** reference is an Array object.

If the array is empty, undefined is returned.
